THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). PARTIES AGREED TO THE FILING OF SUMMARY MOTIONS ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. THE TRIAL IS MARCH 28, 2011 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 220. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS MARCH 17. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS BY MARCH 10. MSC ON MARCH 17 AT 1PM IN ROOM 603. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN, CLERK E. BURA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
